source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/06. 제품 회로도/GATE_BOARD.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Gate board schematic for document number 1717_GATE, dated Thursday, July 04, 2024.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Engineering circuit schematic used as product circuit documentation.
keyPoints: The schematic set contains 13 sheets including cover sheet, block diagram, input connector, gate power, control signal, signal buffer, GATEIC_01 through GATEIC_06, and 12 thru hole.
The block diagram shows signal input, S/W signal buffer, LDO, power input, and Gate IC(6EA) / 140um.
Signal naming defines GF as FPGA I/O, G as GATE, and SB as SIGNAL BUFFER.
The schematic includes L->R MODE(C83B) and R->L MODE(C93B) signal flow descriptions.
Gate IC sheets are labeled GATE IC1 through GATE IC6.

evidence.claim: The schematic defines L->R MODE(C83B) signal flow from SB_STV_L through intermediate STV signals to SB_STV_R.
evidence.evidenceText: L->R MODE(C83B) : SB_STV_L -> SB_STV_R1 -> SB_STV_L1 -> SB_STV_R2 -> SB_STV_L2 -> SB_STV_R3 -> SB_STV_L3 -> SB_STV_R4 -> SB_STV_L4 -> SB_STV_R5 -> SB_STV_L5 -> SB_STV_R

evidence.claim: The schematic defines R->L MODE(C93B) signal flow from SB_STV_R through intermediate STV signals to SB_STV_L.
evidence.evidenceText: R->L MODE(C93B) : SB_STV_R -> SB_STV_L5 -> SB_STV_R5 -> SB_STV_L4-> SB_STV_R4 -> SB_STV_L3 -> SB_STV_R3 -> SB_STV_L2 -> SB_STV_R2 -> SB_STV_L1 -> SB_STV_R1 -> SB_STV_L

evidence.claim: The signal buffer sheet uses TCA9539RGER and LSF0108PWR components.
evidence.evidenceText: U13 TCA9539RGER ... U10 LSF0108PWR ... U12 LSF0108PWR ... U11 LSF0108PWR

evidence.claim: The gate IC connector part shown for gate IC sheets is 05002HR-50J05.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
No product model is stated in the extracted schematic text; productSignal is Unclassified.
Revision metadata is partially ambiguous because the cover sheet shows revision A, while later title blocks contain placeholders such as <RevCo and <RevCode>.
No standards are cited in the source text.
OCR/text extraction quality is limited by repeated title blocks, schematic coordinate artifacts, placeholders, and fragmented Korean text.
